reviews.review_description: Been waiting for this game almost as long as I've had my head set. The game is obviously very alpha at the moment with just enough to get a feeling for the combat and mechanics. The graphics are spot on, especially the auto cannon fire, it feels like letting off a nice volley. The clouds add a really nice touch too and the cockpit is well detailed. The game is smooth and the music gives it that BSG atmosphere which I love. The difficulty is a touch to hard for me at the moment, I found it tough to keep a lock on as those enemy seem to spin round me so fast even with my drift on, but I did manage to take a few ships out. Maybe a difficulty setting would help, or faster spin. I'm looking forward to more strategic options and more voice content. It would be great to have more voice chatter and voice from a commander on the overall battlefield situation. Keep up the great work, this has so much potential and I can wait to see how it develops. Also really nice to have a roadmap for development.
